title: youkie's Blog
subTitle: Even after I'm gone, it will live on forever on GitHub.
allHead: <style>b{pointer-events:none;}</style><script>(function(){var a_idx=0;window.onclick=function(e){var a=["富强","民主","文明","和谐","自由","平等","公正","法治","爱国","敬业","诚信","友善"];var s=document.createElement("b");s.style.zIndex=999;s.style.top=(e.pageY-20)+"px";s.style.left=e.pageX+"px";s.style.position="absolute";s.style.fontWeight="bold";s.style.color="#ff6651";s.style.cursor="default";s.innerHTML=a[a_idx];a_idx=(a_idx+1)%a.length;document.body.appendChild(s);var f=16,t=e.pageY-20,r=1,i=1;var timer=setInterval(function(){if(r<=0){clearInterval(timer);s.remove()}s.style.top=(t-i)+"px";s.style.opacity=r;s.style.fontSize=f+"px";t--;i++;r-=0.02},15)}})();</script>
